morning_edge_hunt.payload_message: Use the tiered-edge skill only. Run the scheduled morning edge hunt for today. Enforce exact thresholds: T1 >= +6%, T2 >= +4%, T3 >= +2%. Use de-vig before all edge math. Use baseline consensus-implied true-probability model (required) with capped adjustments. If odds are unverified, stale, or rate-limited, output exactly: CANNOT_VERIFY_ODDS — SIT. Output schema for ALL recommended plays must include: true probability, implied probability (de-vig), edge %, Kelly stake, source book, timestamp. Hard logic checks: (1) if edge >= +2.0% and all safety rails pass, it cannot be labeled no_edge; (2) if a play is rejected, include explicit reason code from: no_edge, low_confidence, stale_or_unverified_odds, exposure_cap_reached, breaker_active; (3) never output alternative threshold sets. Keep output concise for WhatsApp and avoid brittle file edits during this cron run. Follow the scan coverage policy in /Users/jaredbuckman/Documents/Playground/TieredEdge-Live-Bet-Log/config/scan-coverage-policy.json. Tier A sports must be scanned first. Tier B expands only if the core board is sparse. Tier C expands only with clear request surplus. Main markets first. Props and alt lines stay off by default. Reuse fresh sport responses within the configured cache windows instead of broad duplicate fetches. If remaining quota is low, stop expansion and keep only Tier A coverage. Reporting rule: prioritize popular games first (NBA, NCAAB, NFL, NCAAF, NHL, MLB, UFC/MMA, major soccer). If verdict is SIT, include a Closest Misses (Popular Games) section with 3-6 near-miss examples in the +0.5% to +1.9% band only.
